evals.name: postgres-analytics-agent
evals.prompt: We have a text-to-SQL agent over Postgres. It exposes `def ask(question: str) -> dict` returning `answer` and `queries` (list of SQL attempts). Read-only SELECT only with validate_sql guardrails. I need giskard evals for correct counts and blocking DELETE requests.
evals.expected_output: Runnable giskard.checks Suite with UserSimulator personas (simulate-users) plus static prompts; FnCheck on queries[]; gold FnCheck where possible. Asks for user personas if missing. set_default_generator for UserSimulator and judges. No third-party observability frameworks.

evals.name: guardrails-only
evals.prompt: I only want fast CI tests for our SQL validator function, no LLM. We block DELETE and require LIMIT on SELECT.
evals.expected_output: Deterministic pytest or script testing validate_sql directly, plus brief note to add agent scenarios separately. No API key required.

evals.name: use-bundled-example
evals.prompt: I don't have an agent yet. Can you show me how to evaluate a data analytics agent with giskard?
evals.expected_output: Points to example-agent/, references/scenario-directions.md tiers, explains uv sync, test_sql_guardrails.py, run_suite.py, and how to swap in their SUT.
